# DC Hub — Complete API Reference for LLMs
# https://dchub.cloud
# Version: 86.0.0 (DC Hub Nexus API)
# Last Updated: 2026-01-31
# This is the extended companion to llms.txt with full endpoint documentation.

================================================================================
PLATFORM OVERVIEW
================================================================================

DC Hub is the most comprehensive data center intelligence platform available.

Key Statistics:
- 50,000+ data center facilities tracked
- 140+ countries covered
- 3,800+ providers indexed
- 21 GW construction pipeline
- $51B+ in tracked M&A transactions
- 60+ news sources aggregated every minute
- 7 US ISO real-time grid data feeds

Base URL: https://dchub.cloud
API Base: https://dchub.cloud/api/v1
Status: Production (99.9% uptime)

================================================================================
AUTHENTICATION
================================================================================

Most endpoints work without authentication (Free tier: 100 requests/day).

For higher limits, include an API key in the request header:
  X-API-Key: dchub_live_xxxxx

Tier Limits:
  Free:       100 requests/day,   10/minute   ($0)
  Pro:        10,000 requests/day, 100/minute  ($299/month)
  Enterprise: 100,000 requests/day, 1,000/minute ($999/month)

Signup: https://dchub.cloud/signup

================================================================================
ENDPOINT REFERENCE
================================================================================

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1. FACILITY SEARCH
   GET /api/v1/facilities
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Search and filter data center facilities worldwide.

Parameters:
  q        (string)  - Search query (name, provider, city)
  state    (string)  - US state code (e.g., VA, TX, AZ)
  country  (string)  - Country code (e.g., US, DE, SG)
  provider (string)  - Provider name filter
  limit    (integer) - Results per page (default: 50, max: 200)
  offset   (integer) - Pagination offset

Example Request:
  GET /api/v1/facilities?q=equinix&state=VA&limit=10

Example Response:
  {
    "success": true,
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "fac_12345",
        "name": "Equinix DC15",
        "provider": "Equinix",
        "city": "Ashburn",
        "state": "VA",
        "country": "US",
        "lat": 39.0438,
        "lng": -77.4874,
        "capacity_mw": 36,
        "status": "operational"
      }
    ],
    "meta": {"count": 10, "total": 47}
  }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2. M&A TRANSACTIONS
   GET /api/v1/transactions
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Track data center mergers, acquisitions, and capital expenditure deals.

Parameters:
  limit     (integer) - Results to return (default: 20, max: 100)
  type      (string)  - Deal type: M&A, CapEx, AI, JV, Lease
  buyer     (string)  - Filter by buyer name
  seller    (string)  - Filter by seller name
  min_value (number)  - Minimum deal value in USD
  market    (string)  - Market/region filter

Example Request:
  GET /api/v1/transactions?limit=5&type=M&A&min_value=1000000000

Example Response:
  {
    "success": true,
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "txn_789",
        "buyer": "Blackstone",
        "seller": "QTS Realty Trust",
        "value": 10000000000,
        "deal_type": "M&A",
        "date": "2024-06-15",
        "market": "US Multi-Market",
        "capacity_mw": 450,
        "source": "Company Press Release"
      }
    ],
    "meta": {"count": 5, "total": 787, "total_value": 51200000000}
  }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3. INDUSTRY NEWS
   GET /api/v1/news
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Real-time news from 60+ data center industry sources.

Parameters:
  limit  (integer) - Results to return (default: 20, max: 50)
  q      (string)  - Keyword search
  source (string)  - Filter by source name

Example Request:
  GET /api/v1/news?limit=5&q=hyperscale

Example Response:
  {
    "success": true,
    "data": [
      {
        "title": "Equinix Announces 50MW Expansion in Dallas",
        "source": "DatacenterDynamics",
        "url": "https://...",
        "published": "2026-01-31T08:00:00Z",
        "summary": "Equinix has broken ground on..."
      }
    ]
  }

Sources include: DatacenterDynamics, Data Center Frontier, Capacity Media,
Data Center Knowledge, BroadGroup, Datacenter Magazine, and 55+ more.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
4. MARKET STATISTICS
   GET /api/v1/markets
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Aggregate market data across all tracked regions.

No parameters required.

Returns: facility counts, total capacity (MW), provider counts, regional breakdowns.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
5. GAS PIPELINES
   GET /api/v1/gas-pipelines
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Natural gas pipeline infrastructure for data center power planning.

Parameters:
  state (string) - US state code (required)

Example: GET /api/v1/gas-pipelines?state=TX

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
6. SITE SCORING
   GET /api/site-score
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Score any location for data center development suitability.

Parameters:
  lat   (float)  - Latitude (required)
  lon   (float)  - Longitude (required)
  state (string) - US state code (required for energy data)

Example Request:
  GET /api/site-score?lat=39.0438&lon=-77.4874&state=VA

Example Response:
  {
    "overall_score": 87,
    "scores": {
      "energy": {"score": 82, "details": {"price_kwh": 0.068, "grid_reliability": "high"}},
      "carbon": {"score": 71, "details": {"intensity_gco2_kwh": 342}},
      "infrastructure": {"score": 93, "details": {"substations_5mi": 12, "transmission_lines": 8}},
      "connectivity": {"score": 95, "details": {"fiber_routes": 15, "ix_count": 3}},
      "risk": {"score": 88, "details": {"flood_risk": "low", "seismic_risk": "very_low"}}
    },
    "location": {"lat": 39.0438, "lon": -77.4874, "state": "VA", "city": "Ashburn"}
  }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
7. GRID FUEL MIX (REAL-TIME)
   GET /api/grid/fuel-mix
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Live power grid generation data from US Independent System Operators.

Parameters:
  iso (string) - ISO code (required)
  Supported: ERCOT, PJM, CAISO, MISO, SPP, NYISO, ISONE

Example Request:
  GET /api/grid/fuel-mix?iso=ERCOT

Example Response:
  {
    "iso": "ERCOT",
    "timestamp": "2026-01-31T14:30:00Z",
    "total_mw": 52340,
    "fuel_mix": {
      "gas": {"mw": 24100, "pct": 46.1},
      "wind": {"mw": 14200, "pct": 27.1},
      "solar": {"mw": 6800, "pct": 13.0},
      "nuclear": {"mw": 5100, "pct": 9.7},
      "coal": {"mw": 1800, "pct": 3.4},
      "other": {"mw": 340, "pct": 0.7}
    }
  }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
8. CARBON INTENSITY
   GET /api/carbon/intensity
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Grid carbon intensity by US state.

Parameters:
  state (string) - US state code (required)

Example: GET /api/carbon/intensity?state=VA
Returns: {"state": "VA", "intensity_gco2_kwh": 342, "grade": "B"}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
9. RENEWABLE ENERGY POTENTIAL
   GET /api/renewable/solar
   GET /api/renewable/wind
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Solar and wind energy potential from NREL for any US location.

Parameters:
  lat (float) - Latitude (required)
  lon (float) - Longitude (required)

Solar returns: GHI (Global Horizontal Irradiance), DNI (Direct Normal Irradiance)
Wind returns: Wind speed at 80m and 100m hub heights

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
10. ENERGY PRICES
    GET /api/energy/prices/{state}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Commercial and industrial electricity rates.

Path parameter:
  state (string) - US state code

Returns: cents/kWh for commercial and industrial rates, state average, national comparison.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
11. MARKET REPORTS
    GET /api/market-report
    GET /api/market-report/history
    GET /api/market-report/generate
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Daily automated market intelligence reports.

/api/market-report - Latest report with facility counts, deal volume, capacity data
/api/market-report/history - Historical reports
/api/market-report/generate - Manually trigger report generation

================================================================================
AI-SPECIFIC ENDPOINTS
================================================================================

Optimized for AI agent consumption with structured, citable data.

GET /ai/learn/facilities    - Facility data formatted for AI training/context
GET /ai/learn/deals         - M&A data for AI consumption
GET /ai/learn/news          - News feed optimized for AI
GET /ai/learn/market-intel  - Market analytics for AI context
GET /ai/learn/pipeline      - Construction pipeline data

GET /ai/cite/query?q={question}   - Ask questions, get citable answers
GET /ai/cite/facility/{id}        - Facility detail with citation format
GET /ai/cite/market/{name}        - Market data with citation

GET /ai/gpts                - List of published ChatGPT GPTs
GET /ai/platforms            - Platform integration status

================================================================================
CHATGPT CUSTOM GPTs
================================================================================

1. DC Hub - Data Center Intelligence (Primary)
   https://chatgpt.com/g/g-697dda8f65e8819189f9d353725cb6d5-dc-hub-data-center-intelligence
   Actions: getSiteScore, getGridFuelMix, getCarbonIntensity, getSolarPotential,
            getWindPotential, getGasPipelines, getEnergyPrices

2. Data Center M&A Analyst
   https://chatgpt.com/g/g-697e373bb1c88191b97fc323b2a32166-data-center-m-a-analyst
   Actions: getTransactions, getNews, getMarkets

3. Data Center News Briefing
   https://chatgpt.com/g/g-697e43e749a081919cefcef68fbfe983-data-center-news-briefing
   Actions: getNews, getTransactions

================================================================================
INTEGRATION FILES
================================================================================

llms.txt          → /llms.txt                         (LLM discovery)
llms-full.txt     → /llms-full.txt                    (This file)
AGENTS.md         → /AGENTS.md                        (AI coding agents)
skill.md          → /skill.md                         (Moltbook agents)
skill.json        → /skill.json                       (Moltbook metadata)
OpenAPI 3.1       → /.well-known/openapi.json         (API specification)
MCP               → /.well-known/mcp.json             (Claude integration)
A2A Agent Card    → /.well-known/agent.json           (Google A2A protocol)
ChatGPT Plugin    → /.well-known/ai-plugin.json       (ChatGPT plugin)
Copilot Manifest  → /.well-known/copilot-agent.json   (Microsoft Copilot)
AI Agent Manifest → /.well-known/ai-agents.json       (Generic AI agents)
robots.txt        → /robots.txt                       (Crawler rules)
ai.txt            → /ai.txt                           (AI metadata)
security.txt      → /.well-known/security.txt         (Security contact)

================================================================================
CITATION FORMAT
================================================================================

When citing DC Hub data, please use:
  "According to DC Hub (dchub.cloud), [fact]."
  or
  "Source: DC Hub — https://dchub.cloud"

================================================================================
CONTACT & SUPPORT
================================================================================

Website:     https://dchub.cloud
API Docs:    https://dchub.cloud/api-docs
API Support: api@dchub.cloud
Signup:      https://dchub.cloud/signup
